title: crataegus monogyna var. tauscheri
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. tauscheri, also known as the hawthorn tree, is a variety of the common hawthorn plant (Crataegus monogyna) native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna var. tauscheri lie in its berries, leaves, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of heart failure, high blood pressure, and certain types of cancer. Crataegus monogyna var. tauscheri is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
